channel.title: Privacy on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer

item.title: Privacy by Design: Lessons from EU DMA Compliance
item.description: What building privacy-first frameworks for EU DMA compliance taught me about engineering for regulation.
item.content:encoded: Coming soon — reflections on building privacy-first technical frameworks, turning compliance requirements into reusable engineering patterns, and why ‘privacy by design’ is more than a buzzword.
